name: lp-ftbfs-report-frontend-tests
description: Frontend tests for lp-ftbfs-report filters (uses Bun)

scripts.generate-html: cd ../.. && uv run lp-ftbfs-report --dummy-data tests/fixtures/comprehensive.json oracular amd64 arm64 riscv64
scripts.ci: bun run typecheck && bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run test
